teamObjective.explanation: Leading the A maximizes the probability of retaining the lead and exiting with the 2 on the next turn, which is the dominant play in this endgame race.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2) holds 3 cards and has made no public plays. They likely want me to exit quickly so our team secures first place, but no specific signal about their card strength exists yet.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3) each hold 3 cards and will try to win this lead to deny me a second lead. They may hold trump-7s, the red trump, or jokers that can beat a non-trump A, but a 2 loses to almost any card they play.
